title: Unit 8 Constructed in China
wikitext:
[]: Unit-8 Constructed in China             Quote Post by Craftee » Fri Mar 21, 2014 10:17 pm I was re watching some NG episodes and came across this scene in episode 7 | 6:45 . I have reason to believe the chinese built Unit 8. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Mar 21, 2014 10:21 pm If you're talking about the MP-Eva Unit 08 from EoE, then yes. If you're talking about Mari's Eva-08 from Rebuild, then that doesn't constitute a proof.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Mar 21, 2014 10:33 pm Wait, if Unit 08 is part of a mass produced Evangelion series, and since mass producing anything usually entails manufacturing everything on the same production assembly line rather quickly, one after another, then doesn’t that mean that China produced all of the Harpies that are seen in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Craftee » Fri Mar 21, 2014 10:41 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Wait, if Unit 08 is part of a mass produced Evangelion series, and since mass producing anything usually entails manufacturing everything on the same production assembly line rather quickly, one after another, then doesn’t that mean that China produced all of the Harpies that are seen in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Mar 21, 2014 10:53 pm I wonder, then, if they just sent the same Eva schematics to the participating countries. Seeing how large these biological creatures are, I guess that’s the only feasible way to mass produce any of this stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Craftee » Fri Mar 21, 2014 11:06 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I wonder, then, if they just sent the same Eva schematics to the participating countries. Seeing how large these biological creatures are, I guess that’s the only feasible way to mass produce any of this stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Mar 21, 2014 11:29 pm There's some discussion about this in a few placed: https://forum.evageeks.org/post/71311/MP-EVAs-What/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/377/Was-Selee-aware-of-the-angel-threat-after-2I/ It's not entirely clear why the Chinese guy is meeting with Gendo and what he's referring to. You'll remember that by EoE, places like Germany and China had MAGI's that were doing Seele's hacking, there's nothing to say that the Mass Production Evas (including Eva-08) weren't produced across several countries all over the world. It could be that a lot of the "politics" are just for show or part of the "motions" in order to get the things that Seele wants done, that is to say, they've got ultimate control, but they can't just go around telling people exactly what to do. They have to go through the motions of acting as if they're independent, being part of the UN, in order to ultimately accomplish a goal. The conversation on the plane in Episode 7 could simply be a part of this.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Sat Mar 22, 2014 12:40 am Didn't they halt all remaining Evas and use the resources and parts on the new MPEs? So the Unit 08 they're referring to isn't the same Unit 08 as in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 22, 2014 12:54 am Th3Marauder wrote: Didn't they halt all remaining Evas and use the resources and parts on the new MPEs? So the Unit 08 they're referring to isn't the same Unit 08 as in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Apr 04, 2014 7:19 am My impression there is that construction on 05 and 06 wasn't halted, merely delayed; active Evas take priority given the fact that the Angels are still a threat.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Apr 04, 2014 7:46 am Maybe Units 05 and 06 started being built as manned Units like the other, but midway the tender specifications changed into making Mass-Produced models?

[]:             Quote Post by Apjak » Fri Apr 18, 2014 1:02 pm ElMariachi wrote: Maybe Units 05 and 06 started being built as manned Units like the other, but midway the tender specifications changed into making Mass-Produced models?
